nodes.name: 蒙大拿州
nodes.summary: 蒙大拿州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括黑嘴天鹅、庫柏鷹、金雕等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 堪薩斯州
nodes.summary: 堪薩斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Scaled quail、Green ibis、橫斑林鴞等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 不列颠哥伦比亚省
nodes.summary: 不列颠哥伦比亚省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联24种鸟类，包括帝雁、雪雁、山翎鹑等24种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Sagebrush sparrow
nodes.summary: Sagebrush sparrow（Sagebrush sparrow，学名 Artemisiospiza nevadensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于不列颠哥伦比亚省、蒙大拿州、堪薩斯州，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | pages =614–615 }} There are records of vagrants along the west coast from British Columbia south and further east of its core range in Montana, Wyoming, Colorado, Kansas, Oklahoma, and Nebraska

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: | pages =614–615 }} There are records of vagrants along the west coast from British Columbia south and further east of its core range in Montana, Wyoming, Colorado, Kansas, Oklahoma, and Nebraska

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered common throughout its range. "Habitat loss in Great Basin and other shrub-dominated ecosystems by mechanical, chemical, and burning methods to remove big sagebrush and increase grasses and forbs for livestock grazing has probably had significant impact on Sagebrush Sparrow distribution, productivity, and long-term population trends."
